encounter_events.ai_justification: Witness lies on an examining surface, matching X155 (witness lies on examining table or couch).

encounter_events.source_citation: our doctor . . . I don't know what else to call him . . . he's coming over and he's looking at . . . that spot on my stomach.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness identifies one being as 'the doctor' who carries out the examination, matching B802 (one being acts as examiner/doctor).

encounter_events.source_citation: he's looking at . . . that spot on my stomach. It tickles a little bit. (Chuckles.) He feels it. A little sensitive.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being touches and feels the witness's stomach, matching X210 (beings touch witness in various places, as if examining).

encounter_events.source_citation: Still don't understand how he can be looking down . . . he's so short.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The examiner being is described as notably short, matching B221 (moderately short, 4-5 feet).

encounter_events.source_citation: I almost feel, lying there, I'm almost high, just a little bit dizzy. But I'm very relaxed.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Witness feels dizzy and semi-conscious, matching E204 (semi-consciousness, disorientation, dizziness, drained).

encounter_events.source_citation: Now there's a metal thing comes up around both my legs. It's very skinny. Moves my legs apart a little bit.
encounter_events.ai_justification: A metal instrument is used to manipulate the witness's legs, matching X220 (beings use handheld instruments, clamps).

encounter_events.source_citation: comes right up under my legs as high as it can go. And they want to feel what's on my skin. My right leg . . . moves my right leg all the way up—that's why I feel like a frog. The doctor now touches my skin under that . . . my leg . . . inside my leg
encounter_events.ai_justification: The instrument spreads the witness's legs and the doctor examines the inner leg/groin area, matching X263 (beings examine genital region of a male witness).

encounter_events.source_citation: My right hand is now paralyzed. I want to move but I can't. / it's falling asleep, there's no feeling in it. Now my left one's getting numb. It starts from the fingertips and it goes right to the elbows, right up to the shoulders. They're both totally paralyzed. / My legs are now paralyzed.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Progressive paralysis spreads through the witness's arms and legs, matching E315 (paralysis, numbness).

encounter_events.source_citation: God, I'm even more relaxed than I was before. (Sighs.) I'm almost asleep, but not quite.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Witness becomes extremely relaxed and nearly unconscious, matching E300 (pacification effect: witness calm, euphoric, relaxed).

encounter_events.source_citation: Immediately upon awakening from the trance, Steve complained that his ears bothered him. He felt a peculiar pressure not unlike that experienced in an airplane during a sudden shift of altitude.
encounter_events.ai_justification: After hypnosis, the witness experiences ear pressure, matching E101 (pressure effects: ears pop, head hurts). This is a conscious post-hypnosis observation.

encounter_events.source_citation: When he first entered the big, whitish room, he walked towards the table
encounter_events.ai_justification: Steven describes entering a large whitish room containing an examination table, consistent with U202 (Examination room).

encounter_events.source_citation: the big, whitish room
encounter_events.ai_justification: The room is described as whitish, matching U220 (White interior).

encounter_events.source_citation: he walked towards the table, which he said grew straight out of the floor 'like a mesa,' and which was about chest-high
encounter_events.ai_justification: The table grows from the floor like a mesa, consistent with U300 (Room has examination table or bed).

encounter_events.source_citation: The next moment, he was seated on the table nearly naked, and his clothes were nowhere to be seen.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Steven experiences a gap in memory between approaching the table and finding himself on it, consistent with E201 (Doorway amnesia: blackout during transition).

encounter_events.source_citation: he was seated on the table nearly naked, and his clothes were nowhere to be seen.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Steven finds himself nearly naked with clothes gone, indicating undressing occurred, matching X100 (Witness undresses or is undressed).

encounter_events.source_citation: he was seated on the table nearly naked
encounter_events.ai_justification: Steven is positioned on the examination table, consistent with X155 (Witness lies on examining table or couch). Though seated rather than lying, the table is the examination surface.

encounter_events.source_citation: The thin, round metal loops which raised and slightly spread his legs must have come up from the surface of the table. They completely encircled his thighs very high up—almost at the level of his hip sockets
encounter_events.ai_justification: Metal loops from the table restrain and position the witness's legs, consistent with X156 (Witness lies immobilized or restrained).

encounter_events.source_citation: the ultimate effect was to force him into a posture not unlike that which results from obstetrical stirrups. As he phrased it at the time, 'I feel like a frog.'
encounter_events.ai_justification: The obstetrical stirrup posture with legs spread at the groin level implies examination of the genital region of a male witness, matching X263.

encounter_events.source_citation: he felt physically dirty, and wanted very much to shower, though he was so tired that he gave up on the idea and just went to bed.
encounter_events.ai_justification: After the original 1973 event, Steven felt physically dirty and wanted to shower, matching A113 (Witness feels unclean and in need of a bath). This is a conscious post-event memory.

encounter_events.source_citation: He definitely had the sense that he had withheld some details of his ordeal from Dr. Clamar and myself, though he wasn't sure what they might be. 'I really don't like to think about it,' he said. 'I'm trying to put the whole thing out of my mind.'
encounter_events.ai_justification: Steven feels compelled to withhold details and avoid thinking about the experience, matching A114 (Witness feels obliged to keep experience a secret).

encounter_events.source_citation: Steven said that the 'doctor' held a whitish, cylindrical object 'like a wand' in his
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being is referred to as the 'doctor,' indicating one being acts as examiner, matching B802.

encounter_events.source_citation: the 'doctor' held a whitish, cylindrical object 'like a wand' in his
encounter_events.ai_justification: The doctor holds a whitish cylindrical wand-like handheld instrument, matching X220 (Beings use handheld instruments).

encounter_events.source_citation: this tubular implement with a rounded end was placed against his chest.
encounter_events.ai_justification: A handheld instrument (tubular, rounded end, about 7-8 inches long) is used on the witness during the examination, matching X220: 'Beings use handheld instruments, clamps.'

encounter_events.source_citation: For a short time, he recalls, this tubular implement with a rounded end was placed against his chest.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The instrument is specifically placed on the witness's chest, matching X226: 'A small instrument lies on the chest of the witness.'

encounter_events.source_citation: It appeared to be very heavy, and seemed to be regarded by the others as highly significant, 'As if it were the most important part of the entire operation.'
encounter_events.ai_justification: The beings treat the instrument as the most important part of the operation, showing a cold, task-focused indifference to the witness's experience, matching B905: 'Beings behave in a cold, indifferent, insensitive' manner.

encounter_events.source_citation: I told him about cases I had uncovered involving scars on the bodies of UFO abductees.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The investigator notes scars on abductees' bodies, and Steven is selected for medical examination of these wound traces, matching A107: 'Linear or circular scar.'

encounter_events.source_citation: He said when they pressed here, and he indicated his femoral nerve, his thigh moved. / He exactly described the motor reaction that happens when the femoral nerve is stimulated.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Steven describes the beings stimulating his femoral nerve and observing the resulting motor reflex in his thigh. This is a test of reflexes (X244), confirmed by Dr. Cooper as anatomically accurate.

encounter_events.source_citation: He asked me what I thought they were doing when they went up and down his back with their machine, stimulating various nerves.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Steven describes the beings using a machine that moved along his back stimulating various nerves. This corresponds to X221: beings use probes or electrodes connected to other machinery.

encounter_events.source_citation: I told him that it seemed to me they just wanted to find out how he worked.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Dr. Cooper's medical interpretation of the beings' systematic nerve stimulation is that they were investigating how the human nervous system functions, mapping B716: interest in the nervous system.

encounter_events.source_citation: The tiny scar near his navel could have had any number of causes.
encounter_events.ai_justification: A small scar near the navel is noted during the post-abduction medical examination. This maps to A107: linear or circular scar. Memory state is 'conscious' as this is a physical finding observed during a waking medical exam, not recovered under hypnosis.
